<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="nl">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Falcon Team DroneOps</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Rajdhani:wght@500;600;700&family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;500;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jspdf/2.5.1/jspdf.umd.min.js"></script>
<style>
:root{
  --bg:#08090a;
  --bg2:#0f1014;
  --bg3:#16181d;
  --card:#1a1c22;
  --border:rgba(184,148,65,.2);
  --border2:rgba(184,148,65,.45);
  --gold:#c9a84c;
  --gold2:#e8c97a;
  --gold3:#f5e0a0;
  --golddim:rgba(184,148,65,.12);
  --white:#f0f0f0;
  --muted:#8a8a9a;
  --green:#4caf7d;
  --orange:#d4873a;
  --red:#c94c4c;
  --text:#e8e6e0;
  --font:"Space Grotesk",sans-serif;
  --title:"Rajdhani",sans-serif;
  --mono:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;
}
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
body{font-family:var(--font);background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);min-height:100vh;font-size:14px}

/* ── SCROLLBAR ── */
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:6px;height:6px}
::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:var(--bg2)}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border2);border-radius:3px}

/* ── HEADER ── */
header{
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,#000 0%,#111210 60%,#1a1608 100%);
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2);
  padding:0 20px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;
  height:64px;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:100;
  box-shadow:0 2px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.6);
}
.logo-img{width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;border:1.5px solid var(--gold);flex-shrink:0;box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(201,168,76,.3)}
.logo-text{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1px}
.logo-main{font-family:var(--title);font-size:20px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--gold2);text-transform:uppercase;line-height:1}
.logo-sub{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:3px;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;font-family:var(--mono)}
.gold-divider{width:1px;height:36px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,transparent,var(--gold),transparent);margin:0 4px}
.version-badge{background:var(--golddim);border:1px solid var(--border2);color:var(--gold);font-size:10px;font-family:var(--mono);padding:2px 8px;border-radius:3px;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase}
.header-right{margin-left:auto;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px}
.header-time{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);text-align:right;line-height:1.5}
.header-time .time-val{color:var(--gold2);font-size:15px;display:block}

/* ── TABS ── */
.tabs-bar{
  background:#0b0c0f;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
  padding:0 20px;display:flex;gap:2px;overflow-x:auto;
}
.tab{
  padding:13px 16px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;
  color:var(--muted);border-bottom:2px solid transparent;white-space:nowrap;
  transition:color .2s,border-color .2s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;
  user-select:none;letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;font-family:var(--title);font-size:13px;
}
.tab:hover{color:var(--gold2)}
.tab.active{color:var(--gold2);border-bottom-color:var(--gold)}

/* ── MAIN ── */
main{padding:20px;max-width:1120px}
.tab-panel{display:none}
.tab-panel.active{display:block}

/* ── SECTION TITLES ── */
.section-title{
  font-family:var(--title);font-size:13px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:12px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
}
.section-title::after{content:"";flex:1;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(to right,var(--border2),transparent)}

/* ── CARDS ── */
.card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:18px 20px}
.card-title{font-family:var(--title);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}

/* ── GRID ── */
.grid-2{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px}
.grid-3{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:16px}
.grid-4{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px}
@media(max-width:768px){.grid-2,.grid-3,.grid-4{grid-template-columns:1fr}}

/* ── METRICS ── */
.metric-block{
  text-align:center;padding:14px 8px;background:var(--bg3);border-radius:8px;
  border:1px solid var(--border);position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.metric-block::before{content:"";position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(to right,transparent,var(--gold),transparent)}
.metric-label{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:6px;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;font-family:var(--title)}
.metric-value{font-size:26px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--mono);line-height:1}
.metric-unit{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:4px}
.metric-status{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.8px;padding:2px 10px;border-radius:2px;margin-top:7px;display:inline-block;text-transform:uppercase;font-family:var(--title)}
.status-ok{background:rgba(76,175,125,.15);color:var(--green);border:1px solid rgba(76,175,125,.3)}
.status-warn{background:rgba(212,135,58,.15);color:var(--orange);border:1px solid rgba(212,135,58,.3)}
.status-bad{background:rgba(201,76,76,.15);color:var(--red);border:1px solid rgba(201,76,76,.3)}

/* ── INPUTS ── */
input[type="text"],input[type="email"],input[type="date"],input[type="time"],select,textarea{
  width:100%;background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border2);border-radius:6px;
  color:var(--white);font-family:var(--font);font-size:13px;padding:10px 13px;outline:none;
  transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s;
}
input:focus,select:focus,textarea:focus{border-color:var(--gold2);box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(201,168,76,.12)}
input::placeholder{color:var(--muted)}
label{display:block;font-size:11px;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:5px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.8px;text-transform:uppercase;font-family:var(--title)}
.field{margin-bottom:14px}
select option{background:var(--bg3);color:var(--white)}

/* ── BUTTONS ── */
.btn{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;padding:9px 18px;border-radius:6px;
  font-family:var(--title);font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;border:none;
  transition:all .2s;text-decoration:none;white-space:nowrap;letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;
}
.btn-primary{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold) 0%,#a87c2a 100%);color:#0a0800}
.btn-primary:hover{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold2) 0%,var(--gold) 100%);box-shadow:0 0 16px rgba(201,168,76,.3)}
.btn-outline{background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border2);color:var(--gold)}
.btn-outline:hover{background:var(--golddim);border-color:var(--gold2)}
.btn-success{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2e7d52,#1a4d32);color:#c8f0dc;border:1px solid rgba(76,175,125,.4)}
.btn-success:hover{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#3a9966,#2e7d52)}
.btn-danger{background:transparent;border:1px solid rgba(201,76,76,.4);color:var(--red)}
.btn-danger:hover{background:rgba(201,76,76,.1)}
.btn-sm{padding:6px 13px;font-size:11px}

/* ── EXT LINKS ── */
.ext-link-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(210px,1fr));gap:12px}
.ext-link{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:14px 16px;
  background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;
  text-decoration:none;color:var(--text);transition:all .2s;
}
.ext-link:hover{border-color:var(--gold);background:var(--golddim);transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.3)}
.ext-link-icon{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:18px;flex-shrink:0}
.ext-link-name{font-family:var(--title);font-size:14px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px;color:var(--gold2)}
.ext-link-desc{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px}
.ext-arrow{margin-left:auto;color:var(--gold);font-size:16px}

/* ── AIRSPACE ── */
.airspace-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:6px 14px;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--title);letter-spacing:.5px}
.airspace-badge .dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;animation:pulse 2s infinite}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.3}}

/* ── KP BAR ── */
.kp-bar-track{height:10px;background:var(--bg);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--border)}
.kp-bar-fill{height:100%;border-radius:3px;transition:width .5s ease}
.kp-labels{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:5px;font-family:var(--mono)}

/* ── UPLOAD ── */
.upload-zone{border:2px dashed var(--border2);border-radius:8px;padding:30px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
.upload-zone:hover{border-color:var(--gold2);background:var(--golddim)}

/* ── SUMMARY TABLE ── */
.summary-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse}
.summary-table tr{border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.summary-table tr:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.summary-table td{padding:9px 12px;font-size:13px}
.summary-table td:first-child{color:var(--muted);width:42%;font-weight:500;font-size:12px}
.summary-table td:last-child{color:var(--white);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px}

/* ── TOAST ── */
#toast{position:fixed;bottom:24px;right:24px;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border2);color:var(--text);padding:12px 20px;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;display:none;z-index:9999;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.6);max-width:360px}

/* ── COMPASS ── */
.compass-wrap{display:flex;justify-content:center;margin:12px 0}
.compass{width:100px;height:100px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid var(--border2);background:var(--bg);position:relative;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;box-shadow:inset 0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,.5)}
.compass-arrow{width:3px;height:44px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--red) 50%,var(--bg) 50%);border-radius:2px;transform-origin:bottom center;position:absolute;bottom:50%;left:calc(50% - 1.5px);transition:transform .5s ease}
.compass-labels{position:absolute;width:100%;height:100%;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted);font-family:var(--mono)}
.compass-labels span{position:absolute}
.n{top:4px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);color:var(--gold)}
.s{bottom:4px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%)}
.e{right:5px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%)}
.w{left:5px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%)}

/* ── MISC ── */
.spacer{height:16px}
.row{display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-end}
.row .field{flex:1}
.info-bar{background:var(--golddim);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:10px 14px;font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:16px}
#handboek-list{margin-top:10px}
.file-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:10px 14px;margin-bottom:8px;font-size:13px}
.file-item-name{flex:1;color:var(--white)}
.file-item-size{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)}
textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:80px}
.checklist-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:9px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-size:13px}
.checklist-item:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.checklist-item input[type="checkbox"]{width:16px;height:16px;accent-color:var(--gold);cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0}
.checklist-item label{margin:0;text-transform:none;letter-spacing:0;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);font-family:var(--font);font-weight:400}

/* ── PROFILE STYLES ── */
.profile-bar{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:14px 16px;margin-bottom:18px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.profile-bar label{margin:0;white-space:nowrap;flex-shrink:0}
.profile-bar select{flex:1;min-width:160px;max-width:320px}
.profile-actions{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.profile-card{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:12px 16px;margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;transition:border-color .2s}
.profile-card:hover{border-color:var(--gold)}
.profile-avatar{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--golddim);border:1px solid var(--border2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold2);flex-shrink:0;font-family:var(--mono)}
.profile-info{flex:1;min-width:0}
.profile-name{font-family:var(--title);font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold2);letter-spacing:.5px}
.profile-sub{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px}
.profile-delete{color:var(--red);cursor:pointer;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:18px;border:none;background:transparent;opacity:.5;transition:opacity .2s}
.profile-delete:hover{opacity:1}

/* ── GPS BLOCK ── */
.gps-bar{border-radius:8px;padding:16px 18px;border:1px solid var(--border2);margin-bottom:16px;background:var(--bg3);position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.gps-bar::before{content:"";position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(to right,transparent,var(--gold),transparent)}
.gps-bar-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.gps-dot{width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--muted);flex-shrink:0;transition:background .3s}
.gps-dot.active{background:var(--green);animation:pulse 2s infinite;box-shadow:0 0 6px var(--green)}
.gps-dot.loading{background:var(--orange);animation:pulse .8s infinite}
.gps-dot.error{background:var(--red)}
.gps-status-text{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;flex:1;font-family:var(--title);letter-spacing:.5px}
.gps-coords{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:6px}
.quick-status-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(190px,1fr));gap:12px}
.qs-card{background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:14px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}
.qs-icon{font-size:22px;flex-shrink:0}
.qs-label{font-size:10px;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;font-family:var(--title);font-weight:700}
.qs-value{font-size:18px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--mono);margin-top:3px}
.qs-sub{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:3px}

/* ── MANUAL LOCATION BLOCK ── */
.manual-loc-block{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:16px 18px;margin-top:14px}
.manual-loc-title{font-family:var(--title);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.loc-method-tabs{display:flex;gap:0;margin-bottom:14px;border:1px solid var(--border2);border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden}
.loc-method-tab{flex:1;padding:8px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--title);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.8px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);transition:all .2s;background:transparent;border:none}
.loc-method-tab.active{background:var(--golddim);color:var(--gold2);border-bottom:2px solid var(--gold)}
.loc-method-tab:hover:not(.active){color:var(--text)}
.loc-panel{display:none}
.loc-panel.active{display:block}

/* ── MODAL ── */
.modal-backdrop{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.8);z-index:500;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.modal-backdrop.open{display:flex}
.modal{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border2);border-radius:10px;padding:24px;width:90%;max-width:480px;position:relative;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.6)}
.modal-title{font-family:var(--title);font-size:16px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:18px;color:var(--gold2);letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase}
.modal-close{position:absolute;top:14px;right:14px;background:none;border:none;color:var(--muted);font-size:20px;cursor:pointer}
.modal-close:hover{color:var(--white)}

/* ── GOLD HORIZONTAL LINE ── */
.gold-hr{height:1px;background:linear-gradient(to right,transparent,var(--gold),transparent);margin:16px 0}

/* ── WEATHER NOTE ── */
.weather-source-note{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);text-align:center;margin-top:8px}
.weather-source-note a{color:var(--gold);text-decoration:none}
.weather-source-note a:hover{color:var(--gold2);text-decoration:underline}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ═══ HEADER ═══ -->
<header>
  <img class="logo-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Falcon Team Logo"/>
  <div class="logo-text">
    <div class="logo-main">Falcon Team</div>
    <div class="logo-sub">DroneOps</div>
  </div>
  <div class="gold-divider"></div>
  <span class="version-badge">v2.0</span>
  <div class="header-right">
    <div class="header-time">
      <span class="time-val" id="live-time">--:--:--</span>
      UTC / ZULU
    </div>
  </div>
</header>

<!-- ═══ TABS ═══ -->
<div class="tabs-bar">
  <div class="tab active" data-tab="dashboard" onclick="switchTab('dashboard')">⊞ Dashboard</div>
  <div class="tab" data-tab="weather" onclick="switchTab('weather')">◈ Weer &amp; Wind</div>
  <div class="tab" data-tab="airspace" onclick="switchTab('airspace')">◉ Luchtruim</div>
  <div class="tab" data-tab="operator" onclick="switchTab('operator')">◷ Operator &amp; Missie</div>
  <div class="tab" data-tab="handboek" onclick="switchTab('handboek')">☰ Handboek</div>
  <div class="tab" data-tab="rapport" onclick="switchTab('rapport')">⬡ Rapport &amp; Export</div>
  <div class="tab" data-tab="profiles" onclick="switchTab('profiles')">👥 Profielen</div>
</div>

<main>

<!-- ══════════════ DASHBOARD ══════════════ -->
<div id="tab-dashboard" class="tab-panel active">
  <div class="spacer"></div>

  <!-- HERO BANNER -->
  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:20px;padding:16px 20px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0f0e09 0%,#1a1608 50%,#0f0e09 100%);border:1px solid var(--border2);border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:20px;position:relative;overflow:hidden">
    <div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(to right,transparent,var(--gold),transparent)"></div>
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:64px;height:64px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid var(--gold);box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(201,168,76,.4)" alt="logo"/>
    <div>
      <div style="font-family:var(--title);font-size:22px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold2);letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase">Politiezone Vlaamse Ardennen</div>
      <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:2px">Drone Vluchtvoorbereiding</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- GPS + MANUELE LOCATIE BLOK -->
  <div class="gps-bar">
    <div style="font-family:var(--title);font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:12px">📡 Locatie &amp; Actuele Parameters</div>

    <!-- METHOD SELECTOR -->
    <div class="loc-method-tabs">
      <button class="loc-method-tab active" onclick="setLocMethod('gps',this)">📡 GPS Automatisch</button>
      <button class="loc-method-tab" onclick="setLocMethod('manual',this)">✏️ Manueel Invoeren</button>
      <button class="loc-method-tab" onclick="setLocMethod('search',this)">🔍 Locatie Zoeken</button>
    </div>

    <!-- GPS PANEL -->
    <div class="loc-panel active" id="loc-panel-gps">
      <div class="gps-bar-header">
        <div class="gps-dot" id="gps-dot"></div>
        <div class="gps-status-text" id="gps-status-text">GPS niet actief — klik om huidige locatie te detecteren</div>
        <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="startGPS()" id="gps-btn">Detecteer locatie</button>
        <button class="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onclick="stopGPS()" id="gps-stop-btn" style="display:none">⏹ Stop</button>
      </div>
      <div class="gps-coords" id="gps-coords-text" style="display:none"></div>
    </div>

    <!-- MANUAL PANEL -->
    <div class="loc-panel" id="loc-panel-manual">
      <div class="row">
        <div class="field">
          <label>Breedtegraad (Latitude)</label>
          <input type="text" id="manual-lat" placeholder="bv. 50.7823" style="font-family:var(--mono)"/>
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Lengtegraad (Longitude)</label>
          <input type="text" id="manual-lon" placeholder="bv. 3.6743" style="font-family:var(--mono)"/>
        </div>
        <div style="padding-bottom:14px">
          <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="fetchFromManualCoords()">Ophalen</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)">Voer decimale coördinaten in (WGS84). Voorbeeld: Ronse = 50.7427, 3.6016</div>
    </div>

    <!-- SEARCH PANEL -->
    <div class="loc-panel" id="loc-panel-search">
      <div class="row">
        <div class="field">
          <label>Zoek locatie (stad, adres of gemeente)</label>
          <input type="text" id="dash-location-search" placeholder="bv. Gent, Ronse, Kluisbergen..." onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')fetchFromDashSearch()"/>
        </div>
        <div style="padding-bottom:14px">
          <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="fetchFromDashSearch()">🔍 Zoeken</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- RESULTS -->
    <div id="gps-results" style="margin-top:14px;display:none">
      <div class="gold-hr"></div>
      <div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:10px" id="gps-location-label">— locatie —</div>
      <div class="quick-status-grid">
        <div class="qs-card">
          <div class="qs-icon">💨</div>
          <div style="flex:1">
            <div class="qs-label">Windsnelheid</div>
            <div class="qs-value" id="gps-wind">—</div>
            <div class="qs-sub" id="gps-wind-sub">km/u</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="qs-card">
          <div class="qs-icon">🌪</div>
          <div style="flex:1">
            <div class="qs-label">Windstoten</div>
            <div class="qs-value" id="gps-gusts">—</div>
            <div class="qs-sub">km/u</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="qs-card">
          <div class="qs-icon">🧲</div>
          <div style="flex:1">
            <div class="qs-label">Kp-index</div>
            <div class="qs-value" id="gps-kp">—</div>
            <div class="qs-sub" id="gps-kp-sub">geomagnetisch</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="qs-card">
          <div class="qs-icon">🌡</div>
          <div style="flex:1">
            <div class="qs-label">Temperatuur</div>
            <div class="qs-value" id="gps-temp">—</div>
            <div class="qs-sub">°C</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="qs-card">
          <div class="qs-icon">☁</div>
          <div style="flex:1">
            <div class="qs-label">Bewolking</div>
            <div class="qs-value" id="gps-cloud">—</div>
            <div class="qs-sub">%</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="qs-card">
          <div class="qs-icon">🛡</div>
          <div style="flex:1">
            <div class="qs-label">Luchtruim</div>
            <div class="qs-value" id="gps-airspace" style="font-size:12px">—</div>
            <div class="qs-sub" id="gps-airspace-sub">controleer DroneGuide</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:10px;padding:8px 12px;background:var(--bg);border-radius:4px;border-left:2px solid var(--gold)">
        ⚠️ Luchtruimclassificatie is indicatief. Verifieer altijd via <a href="https://map.droneguide.be/" target="_blank" style="color:var(--gold)">DroneGuide ↗</a> en skeyes vóór de vlucht.
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- METRICS ROW -->
  <div class="grid-4" style="margin-bottom:20px">
    <div class="metric-block">
      <div class="metric-label">Windsnelheid</div>
      <div class="metric-value" id="d-wind" style="color:var(--green)">—</div>
      <div class="metric-unit">km/u</div>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-block">
      <div class="metric-label">Windstoten</div>
      <div class="metric-value" id="d-gusts" style="color:var(--orange)">—</div>
      <div class="metric-unit">km/u</div>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-block">
      <div class="metric-label">Kp-index</div>
      <div class="metric-value" id="d-kp" style="color:var(--green)">—</div>
      <div class="metric-unit">geomagnetisch</div>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-block">
      <div class="metric-label">Luchtruim</div>
      <div class="metric-value" id="d-airspace" style="font-size:14px;color:var(--muted)">—</div>
      <div class="metric-unit">&nbsp;</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="grid-2" style="margin-bottom:20px">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-title">👤 Actieve Operator</div>
      <table class="summary-table">
        <tr><td>Naam</td><td id="d-operator-name">—</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Organisatie</td><td id="d-operator-org">—</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Drone model</td><td id="d-drone">—</td></tr>
      </table>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-title">📍 Huidige Missie</div>
      <table class="summary-table">
        <tr><td>Locatie</td><td id="d-location">—</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Datum</td><td id="d-date">—</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Tijdvenster</td><td id="d-time">—</td></tr>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-title">Externe Operationele Tools</div>
  <div class="ext-link-grid">
    <a href="https://globe.adsbexchange.com/" target="_blank" class="ext-link">
      <div class="ext-link-icon" style="background:rgba(183,148,244,.1)">✈</div>
      <div style="flex:1"><div class="ext-link-name">ADS-B Exchange</div><div class="ext-link-desc">Live vliegverkeer radar</div></div>
      <div class="ext-arrow">↗</div>
    </a>
    <a href="https://map.droneguide.be/" target="_blank" class="ext-link">
      <div class="ext-link-icon" style="background:rgba(76,175,125,.1)">🗺</div>
      <div style="flex:1"><div class="ext-link-name">DroneGuide BE</div><div class="ext-link-desc">Belgisch luchtruim &amp; zones</div></div>
      <div class="ext-arrow">↗</div>
    </a>
    <a href="https://windy.com/" target="_blank" class="ext-link">
      <div class="ext-link-icon" style="background:rgba(201,168,76,.1)">🌬</div>
      <div style="flex:1"><div class="ext-link-name">Windy.com</div><div class="ext-link-desc">Windkaart &amp; voorspelling</div></div>
      <div class="ext-arrow">↗</div>
    </a>
    <a href="https://osmand.net/map" target="_blank" class="ext-link">
      <div class="ext-link-icon" style="background:rgba(212,135,58,.1)">📡</div>
      <div style="flex:1"><div class="ext-link-name">OsmAnd Map</div><div class="ext-link-desc">Terreinkaart offline</div></div>
      <div class="ext-arrow">↗</div>
    </a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════ WEER & WIND ══════════════ -->
<div id="tab-weather" class="tab-panel">
  <div class="spacer"></div>
  <div class="section-title">Locatie Weersdata</div>
  <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:16px">
    <div class="row">
      <div class="field">
        <label>Zoek locatie (stad, gemeente, coördinaten)</label>
        <input type="text" id="location-input" placeholder="bv. Gent, Ronse, 50.74° N, 3.60° E" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')fetchWeather()"/>
      </div>
      <div><button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="fetchWeather()">🔍 Ophalen</button></div>
    </div>
    <div class="weather-source-note">Open-Meteo API (gratis, geen sleutel nodig). Controleer ook op <a href="https://www.windy.com" target="_blank">Windy.com ↗</a></div>
  </div>
  <div id="weather-results" style="display:none">
    <div class="section-title">Actuele Weersomstandigheden</div>
    <div class="grid-4" style="margin-bottom:16px">
      <div class="metric-block"><div class="metric-label">Windsnelheid</div><div class="metric-value" id="w-wind" style="color:var(--green)">—</div><div class="metric-unit">km/u</div><div class="metric-status status-ok" id="w-wind-status">OK</div></div>
      <div class="metric-block"><div class="metric-label">Windstoten</div><div class="metric-value" id="w-gusts" style="color:var(--orange)">—</div><div class="metric-unit">km/u</div></div>
      <div class="metric-block"><div class="metric-label">Windrichting</div><div class="metric-value" id="w-dir" style="color:var(--gold2)">—</div><div class="metric-unit">graden</div></div>
      <div class="metric-block"><div class="metric-label">Temperatuur</div><div class="metric-value" id="w-temp" style="color:var(--gold)">—</div><div class="metric-unit">°C</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="grid-2" style="margin-bottom:16px">
      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-title">🧭 Windkompas</div>
        <div class="compass-wrap">
          <div class="compass">
            <div class="compass-labels"><span class="n">N</span><span class="s">Z</span><span class="e">O</span><span class="w">W</span></div>
            <div class="compass-arrow" id="compass-arrow"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="text-align:center;font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);font-family:var(--mono)" id="w-dir-text">—</div>
      </div>
      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-title">🌦 Overige Metingen</div>
        <table class="summary-table">
          <tr><td>Bewolking</td><td id="w-cloud">—</td></tr>
          <tr><td>Neerslag</td><td id="w-rain">—</td></tr>
          <tr><td>Zichtbaarheid</td><td id="w-vis">—</td></tr>
          <tr><td>Rel. vochtigheid</td><td id="w-humid">—</td></tr>
          <tr><td>Dauwpunt</td><td id="w-dew">—</td></tr>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="section-title">Kp-Index (Geomagnetisch)</div>
  <div class="card">
    <div class="row" style="margin-bottom:12px">
      <div class="field" style="flex:0 0 140px">
        <label>Kp-waarde (0–9)</label>
        <input type="text" id="kp-input" placeholder="bv. 2.5" style="font-family:var(--mono)"/>
      </div>
      <div><button class="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onclick="updateKp()">Bijwerken</button></div>
      <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);align-self:center">
        → <a href="https://www.swpc.noaa.gov/products/planetary-k-index" target="_blank" style="color:var(--gold)">NOAA SWPC ↗</a> &nbsp;|&nbsp; <a href="https://www.stormwatch.be" target="_blank" style="color:var(--gold)">Stormwatch.be ↗</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="kp-bar-track"><div class="kp-bar-fill" id="kp-bar" style="width:0%;background:var(--green)"></div></div>
    <div class="kp-labels"><span>0 — Kalm</span><span>3 — Actief</span><span>5 — Storm</span><span>9 — Extreem</span></div>
    <div style="margin-top:10px;font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);padding:10px;background:var(--bg);border-radius:4px;border-left:2px solid var(--gold)">ℹ️ Bij Kp ≥ 5: verhoogd risico op magneetcompassfouten en GPS-storingen. Overweeg vlucht uit te stellen.</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════ LUCHTRUIM ══════════════ -->
<div id="tab-airspace" class="tab-panel">
  <div class="spacer"></div>
  <div class="section-title">Luchtruimclassificatie</div>
  <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:16px">
    <div class="field">
      <label>Type luchtruim op vluchtlocatie</label>
      <select id="airspace-type" onchange="updateAirspaceStatus()">
        <option value="">— Selecteer type —</option>
        <option value="uncontrolled">Ongecontroleerd luchtruim (klasse G)</option>
        <option value="controlled_low">Gecontroleerd – Laag risico (CTR-rand, klasse E)</option>
        <option value="controlled_high">Gecontroleerd – Toestemming vereist (CTR, klasse C/D)</option>
        <option value="restricted">Beperkt / Verboden zone (R/P-zone)</option>
        <option value="notam">NOTAM van toepassing</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <div id="airspace-info" style="margin-top:10px"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:16px">
    <div class="card-title">📋 Toestemmingen &amp; NOTAM's</div>
    <div class="field"><label>NOTAM-referentie</label><input type="text" id="notam-ref" placeholder="bv. B1234/25"/></div>
    <div class="field"><label>Toestemmingsreferentie (skeyes)</label><input type="text" id="permission-ref" placeholder="bvb. skeyes-ref-20250523"/></div>
    <div class="field"><label>Opmerkingen luchtruim</label><textarea id="airspace-notes" placeholder="Bijzonderheden, contacten ATC, enz."></textarea></div>
  </div>
  <div class="section-title">Externe Luchtruimtools</div>
  <div class="ext-link-grid">
    <a href="https://map.droneguide.be/" target="_blank" class="ext-link"><div class="ext-link-icon" style="background:rgba(76,175,125,.1)">🗺</div><div style="flex:1"><div class="ext-link-name">DroneGuide BE</div><div class="ext-link-desc">Belgische dronezones</div></div><div class="ext-arrow">↗</div></a>
    <a href="https://globe.adsbexchange.com/" target="_blank" class="ext-link"><div class="ext-link-icon" style="background:rgba(183,148,244,.1)">✈</div><div style="flex:1"><div class="ext-link-name">ADS-B Exchange</div><div class="ext-link-desc">Live vliegverkeer</div></div><div class="ext-arrow">↗</div></a>
    <a href="https://www.skeyes.be/nl/voor-de-luchtruimgebruiker/drones/" target="_blank" class="ext-link"><div class="ext-link-icon" style="background:rgba(201,168,76,.1)">🛡</div><div style="flex:1"><div class="ext-link-name">skeyes Drones</div><div class="ext-link-desc">Belgische regelgeving</div></div><div class="ext-arrow">↗</div></a>
    <a href="https://osmand.net/map" target="_blank" class="ext-link"><div class="ext-link-icon" style="background:rgba(212,135,58,.1)">📡</div><div style="flex:1"><div class="ext-link-name">OsmAnd Map</div><div class="ext-link-desc">Offline terreinkaarten</div></div><div class="ext-arrow">↗</div></a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════ OPERATOR & MISSIE ══════════════ -->
<div id="tab-operator" class="tab-panel">
  <div class="spacer"></div>
  <div class="profile-bar">
    <label>👤 Profiel:</label>
    <select id="profile-select" onchange="loadProfile(this.value)">
      <option value="">— Selecteer opgeslagen profiel —</option>
    </select>
    <div class="profile-actions">
      <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="openSaveModal()">💾 Opslaan als profiel</button>
      <button class="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onclick="switchTab('profiles')">📋 Profielbeheer</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="grid-2">
    <div>
      <div class="section-title">Drone Operator</div>
      <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:16px">
        <div class="field"><label>Naam operator *</label><input type="text" id="op-name" placeholder="Voor- en achternaam" oninput="syncDashboard()"/></div>
        <div class="field"><label>Organisatie / eenheid</label><input type="text" id="op-org" placeholder="bv. Politiezone Vlaamse Ardennen" oninput="syncDashboard()"/></div>
        <div class="field"><label>E-mail operator</label><input type="email" id="op-email" placeholder="operator@politie.be"/></div>
        <div class="field"><label>Telefoonnummer</label><input type="text" id="op-phone" placeholder="+32 ..."/></div>
        <div class="field"><label>Registratienummer UAS</label><input type="text" id="op-reg" placeholder="bvb. BEL-xxxxx"/></div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Certificaat (A1/A2/A3)</label>
          <select id="op-cert">
            <option value="">— Selecteer —</option>
            <option>A1 – Dicht bij mensen</option>
            <option>A2 – Dicht bij mensen (vergunning)</option>
            <option>A3 – Veraf van mensen</option>
            <option>STS-01 / STS-02</option>
            <option>PDRA-G01/G02</option>
            <option>Specifieke vergunning</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div class="section-title">Drone &amp; Apparatuur</div>
      <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:16px">
        <div class="field"><label>Drone merk &amp; model *</label><input type="text" id="drone-model" placeholder="bvb. DJI Mavic 3 Enterprise" oninput="syncDashboard()"/></div>
        <div class="field"><label>Serienummer drone</label><input type="text" id="drone-serial" placeholder=""/></div>
        <div class="field"><label>MTOW (gram)</label><input type="text" id="drone-weight" placeholder="bvb. 895"/></div>
        <div class="field"><label>Max. vlieghoogte (m AGL)</label><input type="text" id="drone-alt" placeholder="bvb. 120"/></div>
        <div class="field"><label>Verzekering polisnummer</label><input type="text" id="op-insurance" placeholder=""/></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="section-title">Missiegegevens</div>
  <div class="card">
    <div class="grid-2">
      <div>
        <div class="field"><label>Vluchtlocatie (adres / beschrijving) *</label><input type="text" id="mission-location" placeholder="bvb. Industrieweg 15, 9000 Gent" oninput="syncDashboard()"/></div>
        <div class="field"><label>GPS-coördinaten locatie</label><input type="text" id="mission-coords" placeholder="50.7427, 3.6016" style="font-family:var(--mono)"/></div>
        <div class="field"><label>Doel van de vlucht</label><textarea id="mission-goal" placeholder="bvb. Observatie, inspectie dak, thermografie..."></textarea></div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="row">
          <div class="field"><label>Datum vlucht *</label><input type="date" id="mission-date" oninput="syncDashboard()"/></div>
          <div class="field"><label>Van (lokaal)</label><input type="time" id="mission-time-from" oninput="syncDashboard()"/></div>
          <div class="field"><label>Tot</label><input type="time" id="mission-time-to"/></div>
        </div>
        <div class="field"><label>Aantal geplande vluchten</label><input type="text" id="mission-flights" placeholder="1"/></div>
        <div class="field"><label>Contactpersoon ter plaatse</label><input type="text" id="mission-contact" placeholder="naam + telefoon"/></div>
        <div class="field"><label>Bijzondere omstandigheden / risico's</label><textarea id="mission-risks" placeholder="bvb. Mensen aanwezig, overhead lijnen, ..."></textarea></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════ HANDBOEK ══════════════ -->
<div id="tab-handboek" class="tab-panel">
  <div class="spacer"></div>
  <div class="section-title">Operationeel Handboek</div>
  <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:16px">
    <div class="upload-zone" onclick="document.getElementById('handboek-file').click()" id="upload-zone"
         ondragover="event.preventDefault();this.style.borderColor='var(--gold2)'"
         ondragleave="this.style.borderColor=''"
         ondrop="handleDrop(event)">
      <div style="font-size:36px;margin-bottom:10px">📂</div>
      <div style="font-size:14px;color:var(--muted);font-family:var(--title);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px"><span style="color:var(--gold2)">Klik om bestand te kiezen</span> of sleep hier naartoe</div>
      <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:6px">PDF, DOCX, XLSX — max. 50 MB</div>
    </div>
    <input type="file" id="handboek-file" multiple accept=".pdf,.docx,.xlsx,.doc,.pptx" style="display:none" onchange="handleFileUpload(this)"/>
    <div id="handboek-list"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="section-title">Pre-Flight Checklist</div>
  <div class="card">
    <div id="checklist-wrap">
      <div class="checklist-item"><input type="checkbox" id="c1"><label for="c1">Handboek beschikbaar en actuele versie gecontroleerd</label></div>
      <div class="checklist-item"><input type="checkbox" id="c2"><label for="c2">Luchtruim gecontroleerd op DroneGuide / skeyes</label></div>
      <div class="checklist-item"><input type="checkbox" id="c3"><label for="c3">NOTAM's gecheckt voor vluchtzone</label></div>
      <div class="checklist-item"><input type="checkbox" id="c4"><label for="c4">Weersverwachting gecontroleerd (wind &lt; 10 m/s)</label></div>
      <div class="checklist-item"><input type="checkbox" id="c5"><label for="c5">Kp-index gecontroleerd (&lt; 5 aanbevolen)</label></div>
      <div class="checklist-item"><input type="checkbox" id="c6"><label for="c6">Drone batterijen volledig geladen</label></div>
      <div class="checklist-item"><input type="checkbox" id="c7"><label for="c7">Firmware controller en drone up-to-date</label></div>
      <div class="checklist-item"><input type="checkbox" id="c8"><label for="c8">GPS-signaal geverifieerd (min. 8 satellieten)</label></div>
      <div class="checklist-item"><input type="checkbox" id="c9"><label for="c9">Return-to-Home hoogte ingesteld</label></div>
      <div class="checklist-item"><input type="checkbox" id="c10"><label for="c10">Noodprocedures doorgenomen</label></div>
      <div class="checklist-item"><input type="checkbox" id="c11"><label for="c11">Terreinverkenning uitgevoerd</label></div>
      <div class="checklist-item"><input type="checkbox" id="c12"><label for="c12">Betrokken partijen geïnformeerd</label></div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:14px;text-align:right">
      <button class="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onclick="clearChecklist()">Reset checklist</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════ RAPPORT ══════════════ -->
<div id="tab-rapport" class="tab-panel">
  <div class="spacer"></div>
  <div class="section-title">Vluchtrapport Samenvatting</div>
  <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:16px">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;margin-bottom:16px;padding-bottom:16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:50px;height:50px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid var(--gold)" alt="logo"/>
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:var(--title);font-size:17px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold2);letter-spacing:1.5px">FALCON TEAM — VLUCHTRAPPORT</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:1px">Politiezone Vlaamse Ardennen</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="grid-2">
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:var(--title);font-size:11px;color:var(--gold);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;margin-bottom:8px;text-transform:uppercase">Operator &amp; Drone</div>
        <table class="summary-table">
          <tr><td>Operator</td><td id="r-operator">—</td></tr>
          <tr><td>Organisatie</td><td id="r-org">—</td></tr>
          <tr><td>Certificaat</td><td id="r-cert">—</td></tr>
          <tr><td>Drone model</td><td id="r-drone">—</td></tr>
          <tr><td>Serienummer</td><td id="r-serial">—</td></tr>
          <tr><td>Verzekering</td><td id="r-insurance">—</td></tr>
        </table>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:var(--title);font-size:11px;color:var(--gold);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;margin-bottom:8px;text-transform:uppercase">Missie</div>
        <table class="summary-table">
          <tr><td>Locatie</td><td id="r-location">—</td></tr>
          <tr><td>Coördinaten</td><td id="r-coords">—</td></tr>
          <tr><td>Datum</td><td id="r-date">—</td></tr>
          <tr><td>Tijdvenster</td><td id="r-time">—</td></tr>
          <tr><td>Doel</td><td id="r-goal">—</td></tr>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="gold-hr"></div>
    <div style="font-family:var(--title);font-size:11px;color:var(--gold);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;margin-bottom:8px;text-transform:uppercase">Weersomstandigheden</div>
    <table class="summary-table">
      <tr><td>Windsnelheid</td><td id="r-wind">—</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Windstoten</td><td id="r-gusts">—</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Windrichting</td><td id="r-dir">—</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Kp-index</td><td id="r-kp">—</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Luchtruimtype</td><td id="r-airspace">—</td></tr>
      <tr><td>NOTAM-ref.</td><td id="r-notam">—</td></tr>
    </table>
  </div>
  <div class="section-title">PDF Aanmaken &amp; Verzenden</div>
  <div class="card">
    <div class="grid-2">
      <div>
        <div class="field"><label>E-mailadres ontvanger</label><input type="email" id="email-to" placeholder="ontvanger@politie.be"/></div>
        <div class="field"><label>CC (optioneel)</label><input type="email" id="email-cc" placeholder="cc@email.be"/></div>
        <div class="field"><label>Onderwerp e-mail</label><input type="text" id="email-subject" value="Falcon Team – Drone Vluchtrapport"/></div>
        <div class="field"><label>Bijkomende opmerking</label><textarea id="email-body" placeholder="Bijkomende toelichting ..."></textarea></div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px">
        <button class="btn btn-outline" onclick="buildRapport()" style="width:100%;justify-content:center">🔄 Samenvatting vernieuwen</button>
        <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="generatePDF()" style="width:100%;justify-content:center">📄 PDF Aanmaken &amp; Downloaden</button>
        <button class="btn btn-success" onclick="sendEmail()" style="width:100%;justify-content:center">✉️ Verstuur per E-mail</button>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);padding:12px;background:var(--bg);border-radius:6px;border-left:2px solid var(--gold)">ℹ️ PDF-knop genereert het rapport als download. E-mailknop opent je standaard e-mailprogramma met het rapport.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════ PROFIELEN ══════════════ -->
<div id="tab-profiles" class="tab-panel">
  <div class="spacer"></div>
  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px">
    <div class="section-title" style="margin-bottom:0;flex:1">Opgeslagen Operatorprofielen</div>
    <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="openSaveModal()">＋ Nieuw profiel aanmaken</button>
  </div>
  <div id="profiles-list">
    <div style="color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;padding:24px;text-align:center;background:var(--bg3);border-radius:8px;border:1px dashed var(--border2)">
      Nog geen profielen opgeslagen. Ga naar <strong style="color:var(--white)">Operator &amp; Missie</strong> en klik op <strong style="color:var(--gold)">Opslaan als profiel</strong>.
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</main>

<!-- ══════════════ MODALS ══════════════ -->
<div class="modal-backdrop" id="modal-save">
  <div class="modal">
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('modal-save')">✕</button>
    <div class="modal-title">💾 Operator Profiel Opslaan</div>
    <div class="field"><label>Profielnaam</label><input type="text" id="profile-save-name" placeholder="bvb. Jan Peeters – DJI Mavic"/></div>
    <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:18px;padding:10px;background:var(--bg);border-radius:4px;border-left:2px solid var(--gold)">Operator- en drone-gegevens worden opgeslagen. Missiegegevens worden niet meegenomen in het profiel.</div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end">
      <button class="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onclick="closeModal('modal-save')">Annuleren</button>
      <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="saveProfile()">Opslaan</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="modal-backdrop" id="modal-delete">
  <div class="modal">
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('modal-delete')">✕</button>
    <div class="modal-title" style="color:var(--red)">🗑 Profiel Verwijderen?</div>
    <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:20px" id="modal-delete-text">Dit profiel definitief verwijderen?</div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end">
      <button class="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onclick="closeModal('modal-delete')">Annuleren</button>
      <button class="btn btn-danger btn-sm" onclick="confirmDeleteProfile()">Definitief verwijderen</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="toast"></div>

<script>
var state={wind:null,gusts:null,windDir:null,temp:null,kp:null,cloud:null,rain:null,vis:null,humid:null,dew:null,weatherLocation:"",airspaceType:"",handboekFiles:[]};
var gpsWatchId=null,deleteProfileId=null;

// CLOCK
function updateClock(){var t=new Date().toUTCString().split(" ")[4];document.getElementById("live-time").textContent=t}
setInterval(updateClock,1000);updateClock();

// TABS
function switchTab(id){
  document.querySelectorAll(".tab-panel").forEach(function(p){p.classList.remove("active")});
  document.querySelectorAll(".tab").forEach(function(t){t.classList.remove("active")});
  var panel=document.getElementById("tab-"+id);
  if(panel)panel.classList.add("active");
  var tab=document.querySelector("[data-tab=\""+id+"\"]");
  if(tab)tab.classList.add("active");
  if(id==="rapport")buildRapport();
  if(id==="profiles")renderProfilesPage();
}

// TOAST
var toastT=null;
function toast(msg,d){d=d||2800;var el=document.getElementById("toast");el.textContent=msg;el.style.display="block";if(toastT)clearTimeout(toastT);toastT=setTimeout(function(){el.style.display="none"},d)}

// MODALS
function openModal(id){document.getElementById(id).classList.add("open")}
function closeModal(id){document.getElementById(id).classList.remove("open")}
document.querySelectorAll(".modal-backdrop").forEach(function(el){el.addEventListener("click",function(e){if(e.target===el)el.classList.remove("open")})});

// LOCATION METHOD TABS
function setLocMethod(method,btn){
  document.querySelectorAll(".loc-method-tab").forEach(function(t){t.classList.remove("active")});
  document.querySelectorAll(".loc-panel").forEach(function(p){p.classList.remove("active")});
  btn.classList.add("active");
  document.getElementById("loc-panel-"+method).classList.add("active");
  if(method==="gps"){document.getElementById("gps-btn").style.display="";document.getElementById("gps-stop-btn").style.display="none"}
}

// ── GPS ──
function startGPS(){
  if(!navigator.geolocation){toast("❌ Geolocation niet ondersteund");return}
  setGpsUI("loading","GPS-signaal zoeken…");
  document.getElementById("gps-btn").style.display="none";
  document.getElementById("gps-stop-btn").style.display="";
  gpsWatchId=navigator.geolocation.watchPosition(onGpsSuccess,onGpsError,{enableHighAccuracy:true,maximumAge:30000,timeout:15000});
}
function stopGPS(){
  if(gpsWatchId!==null){navigator.geolocation.clearWatch(gpsWatchId);gpsWatchId=null}
  setGpsUI("","GPS gestopt");
  document.getElementById("gps-btn").style.display="";
  document.getElementById("gps-stop-btn").style.display="none";
}
function setGpsUI(dotClass,text){
  var dot=document.getElementById("gps-dot");
  dot.className="gps-dot"+(dotClass?" "+dotClass:"");
  document.getElementById("gps-status-text").textContent=text;
}

// MANUAL COORDS
async function fetchFromManualCoords(){
  var lat=parseFloat(document.getElementById("manual-lat").value);
  var lon=parseFloat(document.getElementById("manual-lon").value);
  if(isNaN(lat)||isNaN(lon)||lat<-90||lat>90||lon<-180||lon>180){
    toast("⚠️ Ongeldige coördinaten. Gebruik decimale graden, bv. 50.7427 en 3.6016");return;
  }
  toast("🌐 Weerdata ophalen voor "+lat.toFixed(4)+"°N, "+lon.toFixed(4)+"°E …");
  try{
    var geoUrl="https://geocoding-api.open-meteo.com/v1/reverse?latitude="+lat+"&longitude="+lon+"&format=json&language=nl";
    var gr=await fetch(geoUrl);
    var locName=lat.toFixed(4)+"° N, "+lon.toFixed(4)+"° E";
    if(gr.ok){var gd=await gr.json();if(gd.name)locName=gd.name+(gd.admin1?", "+gd.admin1:"")+(gd.country?", "+gd.country:"")}
    setGpsUI("active","Manuele locatie: "+locName);
    document.getElementById("gps-coords-text").textContent="Lat: "+lat.toFixed(5)+" | Lon: "+lon.toFixed(5);
    document.getElementById("gps-coords-text").style.display="block";
    await fetchParamsForCoords(lat,lon,locName);
  }catch(e){toast("❌ Fout: "+e.message)}
}

// SEARCH FROM DASH
async function fetchFromDashSearch(){
  var q=document.getElementById("dash-location-search").value.trim();
  if(!q){toast("⚠️ Voer een locatienaam in");return}
  toast("🔍 Locatie zoeken: "+q+" …");
  try{
    var geoUrl="https://geocoding-api.open-meteo.com/v1/search?name="+encodeURIComponent(q)+"&count=1&language=nl&format=json";
    var gr=await fetch(geoUrl);var gd=await gr.json();
    if(!gd.results||!gd.results.length){toast("❌ Locatie '"+q+"' niet gevonden. Probeer een andere naam.");return}
    var loc=gd.results[0];
    var locName=loc.name+(loc.admin1?", "+loc.admin1:"")+(loc.country?", "+loc.country:"");
    setGpsUI("active","Gezochte locatie: "+locName);
    document.getElementById("gps-coords-text").textContent="Lat: "+loc.latitude.toFixed(5)+" | Lon: "+loc.longitude.toFixed(5);
    document.getElementById("gps-coords-text").style.display="block";
    document.getElementById("location-input").value=locName;
    await fetchParamsForCoords(loc.latitude,loc.longitude,locName);
  }catch(e){toast("❌ Fout: "+e.message)}
}

async function onGpsSuccess(pos){
  var lat=pos.coords.latitude,lon=pos.coords.longitude,acc=Math.round(pos.coords.accuracy);
  setGpsUI("active","GPS actief — locatie bepaald (±"+acc+"m)");
  document.getElementById("gps-coords-text").textContent="Lat: "+lat.toFixed(5)+" | Lon: "+lon.toFixed(5)+" | Nauwkeurigheid: ±"+acc+"m";
  document.getElementById("gps-coords-text").style.display="block";
  var locName=lat.toFixed(4)+"°N, "+lon.toFixed(4)+"°E";
  try{var gr=await fetch("https://geocoding-api.open-meteo.com/v1/reverse?latitude="+lat+"&longitude="+lon+"&format=json&language=nl");if(gr.ok){var gd=await gr.json();if(gd.name)locName=gd.name+(gd.admin1?", "+gd.admin1:"")+(gd.country?", "+gd.country:"")}}catch(e){}
  await fetchParamsForCoords(lat,lon,locName);
}
function onGpsError(err){
  var msgs={1:"Locatietoegang geweigerd.",2:"Locatie kon niet bepaald worden.",3:"Timeout."};
  setGpsUI("error","GPS fout: "+(msgs[err.code]||"Onbekend"));
  document.getElementById("gps-btn").style.display="";
  document.getElementById("gps-stop-btn").style.display="none";
  gpsWatchId=null;
}

async function fetchParamsForCoords(lat,lon,locName){
  try{
    var mUrl="https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude="+lat+"&longitude="+lon+"&current=temperature_2m,cloud_cover,wind_speed_10m,wind_gusts_10m,wind_direction_10m&wind_speed_unit=kmh&timezone=auto";
    var mr=await fetch(mUrl);var md=await mr.json();var c=md.current;
    var wind=Math.round(c.wind_speed_10m),gusts=Math.round(c.wind_gusts_10m),temp=Math.round(c.temperature_2m*10)/10,cloud=Math.round(c.cloud_cover);
    state.wind=wind;state.gusts=gusts;state.windDir=Math.round(c.wind_direction_10m);state.weatherLocation=locName;
    document.getElementById("gps-wind").textContent=wind;
    document.getElementById("gps-wind").style.color=wind<30?"var(--green)":wind<50?"var(--orange)":"var(--red)";
    document.getElementById("gps-wind-sub").textContent=wind<30?"✅ Vliegbaar":wind<50?"⚠️ Grenswaarde":"❌ Te sterk";
    document.getElementById("gps-gusts").textContent=gusts;
    document.getElementById("gps-temp").textContent=temp;
    document.getElementById("gps-cloud").textContent=cloud;
    document.getElementById("gps-location-label").textContent="📍 "+locName;
    document.getElementById("location-input").value=locName;
    syncDashboard();
  }catch(e){document.getElementById("gps-wind").textContent="?"}

  // KP index
  try{
    var r2=await fetch("https://services.swpc.noaa.gov/products/noaa-planetary-k-index.json");
    if(r2.ok){var d2=await r2.json();if(d2&&d2.length>1){var last=d2[d2.length-1];var kpV=parseFloat(last[1]);
    if(!isNaN(kpV)){state.kp=kpV;document.getElementById("gps-kp").textContent=kpV.toFixed(1);
    document.getElementById("gps-kp").style.color=kpV<3?"var(--green)":kpV<5?"var(--orange)":"var(--red)";
    document.getElementById("gps-kp-sub").textContent=kpV<3?"✅ Kalm":kpV<5?"⚠️ Actief":"❌ Stormachtig";
    document.getElementById("kp-input").value=kpV.toFixed(1);updateKpBar(kpV);syncDashboard()}}}
  }catch(e){document.getElementById("gps-kp").textContent="N/B";document.getElementById("gps-kp-sub").textContent="Manueel invoeren"}

  // Airspace
  document.getElementById("gps-airspace").textContent="Verifieer";
  document.getElementById("gps-airspace").style.color="var(--orange)";
  document.getElementById("gps-airspace-sub").textContent="⚠️ Open DroneGuide ↗";

  document.getElementById("gps-results").style.display="block";
  toast("✅ Parameters geladen voor "+locName);
}

// ── WEATHER TAB ──
async function fetchWeather(){
  var q=document.getElementById("location-input").value.trim();
  if(!q){toast("⚠️ Voer een locatie in");return}
  toast("🌐 Locatie opzoeken…");
  try{
    var geoUrl="https://geocoding-api.open-meteo.com/v1/search?name="+encodeURIComponent(q)+"&count=1&language=nl&format=json";
    var gr=await fetch(geoUrl);var gd=await gr.json();
    if(!gd.results||!gd.results.length){toast("❌ Locatie niet gevonden");return}
    var loc=gd.results[0];
    state.weatherLocation=loc.name+(loc.country?", "+loc.country:"");
    document.getElementById("location-input").value=state.weatherLocation;
    var mUrl="https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude="+loc.latitude+"&longitude="+loc.longitude+"&current=temperature_2m,relative_humidity_2m,dew_point_2m,precipitation,cloud_cover,visibility,wind_speed_10m,wind_gusts_10m,wind_direction_10m&wind_speed_unit=kmh&timezone=auto";
    var mr=await fetch(mUrl);var md=await mr.json();var c=md.current;
    state.wind=Math.round(c.wind_speed_10m);state.gusts=Math.round(c.wind_gusts_10m);state.windDir=Math.round(c.wind_direction_10m);
    state.temp=Math.round(c.temperature_2m*10)/10;state.cloud=c.cloud_cover+"%";state.rain=c.precipitation+" mm";
    state.vis=c.visibility?(c.visibility/1000).toFixed(1)+" km":"—";state.humid=c.relative_humidity_2m+"%";
    state.dew=c.dew_point_2m?Math.round(c.dew_point_2m)+"°C":"—";
    renderWeather();syncDashboard();toast("✅ Weersdata geladen voor "+state.weatherLocation);
  }catch(e){toast("❌ Fout: "+e.message)}
}
function renderWeather(){
  document.getElementById("weather-results").style.display="block";
  document.getElementById("w-wind").textContent=state.wind??"—";
  document.getElementById("w-gusts").textContent=state.gusts??"—";
  document.getElementById("w-dir").textContent=state.windDir??"—";
  document.getElementById("w-temp").textContent=state.temp??"—";
  document.getElementById("w-cloud").textContent=state.cloud??"—";
  document.getElementById("w-rain").textContent=state.rain??"—";
  document.getElementById("w-vis").textContent=state.vis??"—";
  document.getElementById("w-humid").textContent=state.humid??"—";
  document.getElementById("w-dew").textContent=state.dew??"—";
  var ws=document.getElementById("w-wind-status");var w=state.wind||0;
  if(w<30){ws.textContent="VLIEGBAAR";ws.className="metric-status status-ok";document.getElementById("w-wind").style.color="var(--green)"}
  else if(w<50){ws.textContent="GRENSWAARDE";ws.className="metric-status status-warn";document.getElementById("w-wind").style.color="var(--orange)"}
  else{ws.textContent="TE STERK";ws.className="metric-status status-bad";document.getElementById("w-wind").style.color="var(--red)"}
  if(state.windDir!==null){document.getElementById("compass-arrow").style.transform="rotate("+state.windDir+"deg)";document.getElementById("w-dir-text").textContent=dirLabel(state.windDir)+" ("+state.windDir+"°)"}
}
function dirLabel(deg){var d=["N","NNO","NO","ONO","O","OZO","ZO","ZZO","Z","ZZW","ZW","WZW","W","WNW","NW","NNW"];return d[Math.round(deg/22.5)%16]}

// KP
function updateKp(){var v=parseFloat(document.getElementById("kp-input").value);if(isNaN(v)||v<0||v>9){toast("⚠️ Voer een geldige Kp-waarde in (0–9)");return}state.kp=v;updateKpBar(v);syncDashboard()}
function updateKpBar(v){var bar=document.getElementById("kp-bar");bar.style.width=(v/9*100)+"%";bar.style.background=v<3?"var(--green)":v<5?"var(--orange)":"var(--red)"}

// AIRSPACE
var airspaceInfo={
  uncontrolled:{text:"Ongecontroleerd luchtruim (klasse G) — geen ATC-toestemming vereist voor drones < 120m AGL.",color:"var(--green)"},
  controlled_low:{text:"Gecontroleerd – Laag risico — controleer DroneGuide en skeyes of melding vereist is.",color:"var(--orange)"},
  controlled_high:{text:"Gecontroleerd – Toestemming vereist bij skeyes (ATC). Vluchten zonder goedkeuring verboden.",color:"var(--red)"},
  restricted:{text:"Beperkte of verboden zone — vluchten niet toegestaan zonder expliciete overheidstoestemming.",color:"var(--red)"},
  notam:{text:"NOTAM actief op of nabij vluchtlocatie — controleer inhoud en pas vlucht aan indien nodig.",color:"var(--orange)"}
};
function updateAirspaceStatus(){
  var type=document.getElementById("airspace-type").value;state.airspaceType=type;
  var el=document.getElementById("airspace-info");
  if(!type){el.innerHTML="";return}
  var info=airspaceInfo[type];
  var label=document.getElementById("airspace-type").options[document.getElementById("airspace-type").selectedIndex].text;
  el.innerHTML="<div style=\"background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:12px 14px;border-left:3px solid "+info.color+"\"><span style=\"color:"+info.color+";font-weight:700;font-family:var(--title);letter-spacing:.5px\">"+label+"</span><div style=\"margin-top:6px;color:var(--text);font-size:13px\">"+info.text+"</div></div>";
  syncDashboard();
}

// FILES
function handleFileUpload(input){Array.from(input.files).forEach(addFile)}
function handleDrop(e){e.preventDefault();document.getElementById("upload-zone").style.borderColor="";Array.from(e.dataTransfer.files).forEach(addFile)}
function addFile(file){state.handboekFiles.push(file);renderFileList()}
function renderFileList(){
  var el=document.getElementById("handboek-list");
  if(!state.handboekFiles.length){el.innerHTML="";return}
  el.innerHTML=state.handboekFiles.map(function(f,i){
    var icon=f.name.endsWith(".pdf")?"📄":f.name.endsWith(".docx")||f.name.endsWith(".doc")?"📝":"📊";
    return "<div class=\"file-item\"><span style=\"font-size:20px\">"+icon+"</span><span class=\"file-item-name\">"+escH(f.name)+"</span><span class=\"file-item-size\">"+(f.size/1024).toFixed(0)+" KB</span><button class=\"btn btn-danger btn-sm\" onclick=\"removeFile("+i+")\" >✕</button></div>";
  }).join("");
}
function removeFile(i){state.handboekFiles.splice(i,1);renderFileList()}
function clearChecklist(){for(var i=1;i<=12;i++)document.getElementById("c"+i).checked=false}

// SYNC
function syncDashboard(){
  var g=function(id){var el=document.getElementById(id);return el?el.value||"—":"—"};
  document.getElementById("d-wind").textContent=state.wind!==null?state.wind:"—";
  document.getElementById("d-gusts").textContent=state.gusts!==null?state.gusts:"—";
  document.getElementById("d-kp").textContent=state.kp!==null?state.kp:"—";
  var ao=document.getElementById("airspace-type");
  document.getElementById("d-airspace").textContent=ao&&ao.selectedIndex>0?ao.options[ao.selectedIndex].text.split(" ")[0]:"—";
  document.getElementById("d-operator-name").textContent=g("op-name");
  document.getElementById("d-operator-org").textContent=g("op-org");
  document.getElementById("d-drone").textContent=g("drone-model");
  document.getElementById("d-location").textContent=g("mission-location");
  document.getElementById("d-date").textContent=g("mission-date");
  var tf=g("mission-time-from"),tt=g("mission-time-to");
  document.getElementById("d-time").textContent=tf+(tt&&tt!=="—"?" – "+tt:"");
}

// RAPPORT
function buildRapport(){
  var g=function(id){var el=document.getElementById(id);return el?el.value||"—":"—"};
  document.getElementById("r-operator").textContent=g("op-name");
  document.getElementById("r-org").textContent=g("op-org");
  document.getElementById("r-cert").textContent=g("op-cert");
  document.getElementById("r-drone").textContent=g("drone-model");
  document.getElementById("r-serial").textContent=g("drone-serial");
  document.getElementById("r-insurance").textContent=g("op-insurance");
  document.getElementById("r-location").textContent=g("mission-location");
  document.getElementById("r-coords").textContent=g("mission-coords");
  document.getElementById("r-date").textContent=g("mission-date");
  document.getElementById("r-time").textContent=g("mission-time-from")+(g("mission-time-to")!=="—"?" – "+g("mission-time-to"):"");
  document.getElementById("r-goal").textContent=g("mission-goal");
  document.getElementById("r-wind").textContent=state.wind?state.wind+" km/u":"—";
  document.getElementById("r-gusts").textContent=state.gusts?state.gusts+" km/u":"—";
  document.getElementById("r-dir").textContent=state.windDir!==null?state.windDir+"° – "+dirLabel(state.windDir):"—";
  document.getElementById("r-kp").textContent=state.kp!==null?String(state.kp):"—";
  var ao=document.getElementById("airspace-type");
  document.getElementById("r-airspace").textContent=ao&&ao.selectedIndex>0?ao.options[ao.selectedIndex].text:"—";
  document.getElementById("r-notam").textContent=g("notam-ref");
  toast("✅ Samenvatting bijgewerkt");
}

// PDF
function generatePDF(){
  if(!window.jspdf||!window.jspdf.jsPDF){toast("❌ PDF-bibliotheek niet geladen. Vernieuw de pagina.");return}
  var jsPDF=window.jspdf.jsPDF;
  var g=function(id){var el=document.getElementById(id);return el?el.value||"—":"—"};
  var doc=new jsPDF({orientation:"portrait",unit:"mm",format:"a4"});
  var W=210,M=20;
  // Gold header
  doc.setFillColor(10,8,3);doc.rect(0,0,W,32,"F");
  doc.setFillColor(160,120,40);doc.rect(0,30,W,1.5,"F");
  doc.setTextColor(210,175,80);doc.setFontSize(18);doc.setFont(undefined,"bold");
  doc.text("FALCON TEAM — DRONE VLUCHTRAPPORT",M,14);
  doc.setFontSize(9);doc.setFont(undefined,"normal");doc.setTextColor(140,140,140);
  doc.text("Politiezone Vlaamse Ardennen · State Operator",M,21);
  doc.text("Gegenereerd: "+new Date().toLocaleString("nl-BE"),W-M,21,{align:"right"});
  var y=40,lh=7,c1=M,c2=85;
  function section(title){
    if(y>260){doc.addPage();y=20}
    doc.setFillColor(20,16,5);doc.rect(M,y-4,W-M*2,8,"F");
    doc.setFillColor(160,120,40);doc.rect(M,y+4,W-M*2,.5,"F");
    doc.setTextColor(210,175,80);doc.setFontSize(10);doc.setFont(undefined,"bold");
    doc.text(title,c1,y+1);y+=lh+2;doc.setFont(undefined,"normal");
  }
  function row(lbl,val){
    if(y>270){doc.addPage();y=20}
    doc.setTextColor(120,115,100);doc.setFontSize(9);doc.text(String(lbl),c1,y);
    doc.setTextColor(240,235,220);doc.text(String(val||"—"),c2,y);y+=lh;
  }
  section("OPERATOR & DRONE");
  row("Naam operator:",g("op-name"));row("Organisatie:",g("op-org"));
  row("E-mail:",g("op-email"));row("Telefoon:",g("op-phone"));
  row("Reg. nr UAS:",g("op-reg"));row("Certificaat:",g("op-cert"));
  row("Drone model:",g("drone-model"));row("Serienummer:",g("drone-serial"));
  row("MTOW:",g("drone-weight")!=="—"?g("drone-weight")+" g":"—");
  row("Max. hoogte:",g("drone-alt")!=="—"?g("drone-alt")+" m AGL":"—");
  row("Verzekering:",g("op-insurance"));y+=3;
  section("MISSIEGEGEVENS");
  row("Locatie:",g("mission-location"));row("GPS-coördinaten:",g("mission-coords"));
  row("Datum:",g("mission-date"));
  row("Tijdvenster:",g("mission-time-from")+(g("mission-time-to")!=="—"?" – "+g("mission-time-to"):""));
  row("Contactpersoon:",g("mission-contact"));
  var goalLines=doc.splitTextToSize(g("mission-goal"),W-M*2-(c2-c1));
  doc.setTextColor(120,115,100);doc.setFontSize(9);doc.text("Doel vlucht:",c1,y);
  doc.setTextColor(240,235,220);doc.text(goalLines,c2,y);y+=goalLines.length*lh;
  var riskLines=doc.splitTextToSize(g("mission-risks"),W-M*2-(c2-c1));
  doc.setTextColor(120,115,100);doc.text("Risico's:",c1,y);
  doc.setTextColor(240,235,220);doc.text(riskLines,c2,y);y+=riskLines.length*lh+3;
  section("WEERSOMSTANDIGHEDEN");
  var ao=document.getElementById("airspace-type");
  row("Weerslocatie:",state.weatherLocation||"—");
  row("Windsnelheid:",state.wind?state.wind+" km/u":"—");
  row("Windstoten:",state.gusts?state.gusts+" km/u":"—");
  row("Windrichting:",state.windDir!==null?state.windDir+"° ("+dirLabel(state.windDir)+")":"—");
  row("Temperatuur:",state.temp?state.temp+"°C":"—");
  row("Kp-index:",state.kp!==null?String(state.kp)+(state.kp<3?" – Kalm":state.kp<5?" – Actief":" – STORM"):"—");y+=3;
  section("LUCHTRUIM");
  row("Type luchtruim:",ao&&ao.selectedIndex>0?ao.options[ao.selectedIndex].text:"—");
  row("NOTAM-referentie:",g("notam-ref"));row("Toestemmingsref.:",g("permission-ref"));
  var nLines=doc.splitTextToSize(g("airspace-notes"),W-M*2-(c2-c1));
  doc.setTextColor(120,115,100);doc.text("Opmerkingen:",c1,y);
  doc.setTextColor(240,235,220);doc.text(nLines,c2,y);y+=nLines.length*lh+3;
  if(y>230){doc.addPage();y=20}
  section("PRE-FLIGHT CHECKLIST");
  var checks=[["c1","Handboek beschikbaar en actueel"],["c2","Luchtruim gecontroleerd"],["c3","NOTAM's gecheckt"],["c4","Weersverwachting OK"],["c5","Kp-index OK"],["c6","Batterijen geladen"],["c7","Firmware up-to-date"],["c8","GPS-signaal geverifieerd"],["c9","Return-to-Home ingesteld"],["c10","Noodprocedures doorgenomen"],["c11","Terreinverkenning OK"],["c12","Partijen geïnformeerd"]];
  checks.forEach(function(item){
    if(y>272){doc.addPage();y=20}
    var checked=document.getElementById(item[0]).checked;
    doc.setTextColor(checked?60:200,checked?160:80,checked?60:60);doc.setFontSize(9);
    doc.text((checked?"[X] ":"[ ] ")+item[1],c1,y);y+=6;
  });
  var pages=doc.getNumberOfPages();
  for(var i=1;i<=pages;i++){
    doc.setPage(i);doc.setFillColor(10,8,3);doc.rect(0,285,W,12,"F");
    doc.setFontSize(8);doc.setTextColor(140,120,60);
    doc.text("FALCON TEAM · POLITIEZONE VLAAMSE ARDENNEN · VERTROUWELIJK",W/2,291,{align:"center"});
    doc.setTextColor(80,75,65);doc.text("Pagina "+i+" / "+pages,W-M,291,{align:"right"});
  }
  var ds=new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);
  doc.save("FalconTeam_DroneOps_"+ds+".pdf");
  toast("✅ PDF gedownload!");
}

// EMAIL
function sendEmail(){
  var g=function(id){var el=document.getElementById(id);return el?el.value||"—":"—"};
  var to=document.getElementById("email-to").value;
  var cc=document.getElementById("email-cc").value;
  var subject=document.getElementById("email-subject").value||"Falcon Team – Drone Vluchtrapport";
  var body=document.getElementById("email-body").value;
  var ao=document.getElementById("airspace-type");
  var txt="FALCON TEAM — DRONE VLUCHTRAPPORT\nPolitiezone Vlaamse Ardennen · State Operator\nGegenereerd: "+new Date().toLocaleString("nl-BE")+"\n\n"
    +"OPERATOR\nNaam: "+g("op-name")+"\nOrganisatie: "+g("op-org")+"\nCertificaat: "+g("op-cert")+"\nDrone: "+g("drone-model")+" (S/N: "+g("drone-serial")+")\n\n"
    +"MISSIE\nLocatie: "+g("mission-location")+"\nDatum: "+g("mission-date")+"\nTijdvenster: "+g("mission-time-from")+" – "+g("mission-time-to")+"\nDoel: "+g("mission-goal")+"\n\n"
    +"WEERSOMSTANDIGHEDEN\nWind: "+(state.wind?state.wind+" km/u":"—")+" | Windstoten: "+(state.gusts?state.gusts+" km/u":"—")+"\nKp-index: "+(state.kp!==null?state.kp:"—")+"\n\n"
    +"LUCHTRUIM\n"+(ao&&ao.selectedIndex>0?ao.options[ao.selectedIndex].text:"—")+"\nNOTAM: "+g("notam-ref")+"\n\n"
    +(body?"---\n"+body+"\n\n":"")
    +"---\nFalcon Team DroneOps Vluchtvoorbereiding App";
  var mailto="mailto:"+to+"?subject="+encodeURIComponent(subject)+"&body="+encodeURIComponent(txt);
  if(cc)mailto+="&cc="+encodeURIComponent(cc);
  window.location.href=mailto;
  toast("📧 E-mailclient geopend");
}

// ── PROFIELEN ──
function escH(s){return String(s).replace(/&/g,"&amp;").replace(/</g,"&lt;").replace(/>/g,"&gt;").replace(/"/g,"&quot;")}
function getProfiles(){try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("falconops_profiles")||"{}")}catch(e){return{}}}
function saveProfiles(obj){try{localStorage.setItem("falconops_profiles",JSON.stringify(obj))}catch(e){toast("⚠️ localStorage niet beschikbaar. Open de app als lokaal HTML-bestand in een browser.")}}

function openSaveModal(){
  var n=document.getElementById("op-name").value,d=document.getElementById("drone-model").value;
  document.getElementById("profile-save-name").value=(n||"Operator")+(d?" – "+d:"");
  openModal("modal-save");
  setTimeout(function(){document.getElementById("profile-save-name").focus()},100);
}
function saveProfile(){
  var label=document.getElementById("profile-save-name").value.trim();
  if(!label){toast("⚠️ Geef een naam aan het profiel");return}
  var id="p_"+Date.now();
  var d={id:id,label:label,savedAt:new Date().toISOString(),
    opName:document.getElementById("op-name").value,opOrg:document.getElementById("op-org").value,
    opEmail:document.getElementById("op-email").value,opPhone:document.getElementById("op-phone").value,
    opReg:document.getElementById("op-reg").value,opCert:document.getElementById("op-cert").value,
    droneModel:document.getElementById("drone-model").value,droneSerial:document.getElementById("drone-serial").value,
    droneWeight:document.getElementById("drone-weight").value,droneAlt:document.getElementById("drone-alt").value,
    opInsurance:document.getElementById("op-insurance").value};
  var profiles=getProfiles();profiles[id]=d;saveProfiles(profiles);
  closeModal("modal-save");refreshProfileDropdown();renderProfilesPage();
  document.getElementById("profile-select").value=id;
  toast("✅ Profiel \""+label+"\" opgeslagen!");
}
function loadProfile(id){
  if(!id)return;
  var p=getProfiles()[id];if(!p){toast("❌ Profiel niet gevonden");return}
  document.getElementById("op-name").value=p.opName||"";
  document.getElementById("op-org").value=p.opOrg||"";
  document.getElementById("op-email").value=p.opEmail||"";
  document.getElementById("op-phone").value=p.opPhone||"";
  document.getElementById("op-reg").value=p.opReg||"";
  document.getElementById("op-cert").value=p.opCert||"";
  document.getElementById("drone-model").value=p.droneModel||"";
  document.getElementById("drone-serial").value=p.droneSerial||"";
  document.getElementById("drone-weight").value=p.droneWeight||"";
  document.getElementById("drone-alt").value=p.droneAlt||"";
  document.getElementById("op-insurance").value=p.opInsurance||"";
  syncDashboard();toast("✅ Profiel \""+p.label+"\" geladen");switchTab("operator");
}
function refreshProfileDropdown(){
  var sel=document.getElementById("profile-select"),cur=sel.value;
  sel.innerHTML="<option value=\"\">— Selecteer opgeslagen profiel —</option>";
  Object.values(getProfiles()).sort(function(a,b){return b.savedAt.localeCompare(a.savedAt)}).forEach(function(p){
    var opt=document.createElement("option");opt.value=p.id;opt.textContent=p.label;sel.appendChild(opt);
  });
  if(cur)sel.value=cur;
}
function renderProfilesPage(){
  var el=document.getElementById("profiles-list");
  var list=Object.values(getProfiles()).sort(function(a,b){return b.savedAt.localeCompare(a.savedAt)});
  if(!list.length){
    el.innerHTML="<div style=\"color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;padding:24px;text-align:center;background:var(--bg3);border-radius:8px;border:1px dashed var(--border2)\">Nog geen profielen. Ga naar <strong style=\"color:var(--white)\">Operator &amp; Missie</strong> en klik op <strong style=\"color:var(--gold)\">Opslaan als profiel</strong>.</div>";
    return;
  }
  el.innerHTML=list.map(function(p){
    var initials=(p.opName||"?").split(" ").map(function(w){return w[0]||""}).slice(0,2).join("").toUpperCase();
    var date=new Date(p.savedAt).toLocaleDateString("nl-BE");
    return "<div class=\"profile-card\"><div class=\"profile-avatar\">"+initials+"</div><div class=\"profile-info\"><div class=\"profile-name\">"+escH(p.label)+"</div><div class=\"profile-sub\">"+escH(p.opOrg||"")+(p.droneModel?" · "+escH(p.droneModel):"")+"</div><div class=\"profile-sub\" style=\"font-size:10px;margin-top:2px\">Opgeslagen: "+date+"</div></div>"
      +"<button class=\"btn btn-outline btn-sm\" onclick=\"loadProfile('"+p.id+"')\" >Laden</button>"
      +"<button class=\"btn btn-outline btn-sm\" onclick=\"updateProfile('"+p.id+"')\" >↺ Update</button>"
      +"<button class=\"profile-delete\" onclick=\"askDeleteProfile('"+p.id+"','"+escH(p.label)+"')\" title=\"Verwijderen\">🗑</button></div>";
  }).join("");
}
function updateProfile(id){
  var profiles=getProfiles();var d=profiles[id];if(!d)return;
  d.opName=document.getElementById("op-name").value;d.opOrg=document.getElementById("op-org").value;
  d.opEmail=document.getElementById("op-email").value;d.opPhone=document.getElementById("op-phone").value;
  d.opReg=document.getElementById("op-reg").value;d.opCert=document.getElementById("op-cert").value;
  d.droneModel=document.getElementById("drone-model").value;d.droneSerial=document.getElementById("drone-serial").value;
  d.droneWeight=document.getElementById("drone-weight").value;d.droneAlt=document.getElementById("drone-alt").value;
  d.opInsurance=document.getElementById("op-insurance").value;d.savedAt=new Date().toISOString();
  profiles[id]=d;saveProfiles(profiles);refreshProfileDropdown();renderProfilesPage();
  toast("✅ Profiel \""+d.label+"\" bijgewerkt");
}
function askDeleteProfile(id,label){deleteProfileId=id;document.getElementById("modal-delete-text").textContent="Profiel \""+label+"\" definitief verwijderen?";openModal("modal-delete")}
function confirmDeleteProfile(){
  if(!deleteProfileId)return;
  var p=getProfiles();var label=p[deleteProfileId]?p[deleteProfileId].label:"";
  delete p[deleteProfileId];saveProfiles(p);deleteProfileId=null;
  closeModal("modal-delete");refreshProfileDropdown();renderProfilesPage();
  toast("🗑 Profiel \""+label+"\" verwijderd");
}

// INIT
document.getElementById("mission-date").value=new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0];
refreshProfileDropdown();
</script>
</body>
</html>
